subcodes.first_line: O Lord and my Hope! This, Thy lowly servant, whose neck is bound with the chain of servitude to Thy sacred Threshold [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: رب و رجائی هذا عبدک الرقیق الذی ارتبط عنقه بسلسله عبودیه عتبتک السامیه
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @spiritual transformation, @Manifestation of God as tree of life; sadratu'l-muntaha, @praise and encouragement
